calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants C&S Transportation, LLC, dba Expedite Solutions or Kyle Ochs.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 8, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 8, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants C&S Transportation, LLC, dba Expedite Solutions, and Kyle Ochs as follows:

Damages/Principal - $107,792.74.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,138.22.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $460.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $115,890.96.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
